cancelOffer(uint256).details: Cancels an existing offer and refunds remaining funds

params.offerId: ID of the offer to cancel

cleanupExpiredOffers(uint256).details: Cleans up expired offers and refunds lenders

params.maxCleanup: Maximum number of offers to clean up in this call

constructor.details: Constructor that disables initializers for implementation contract

executeDrawdown(uint256,bool).details: Executes a drawdown by matching offers with requested amount

params.useSeniorOnly: Whether to only use senior offers

returns.filledOffers: Array of offers used to fulfill the drawdown
returns.weightedApr: Weighted average APR of filled offers

getBestOffers(uint256,bool).details: Returns the best available offers for a given amount

params.useSeniorOnly: Whether to only consider senior offers

returns.bestOffers: Array of best offers sorted by APR
returns.totalAvail: Total available amount from best offers
returns.weightedApr: Weighted average APR of selected offers

getLenderOffers(address).details: Returns offers for a specific lender (limited to first 50)

returns._0: Array of offers belonging to the lender

getOffer(uint256).details: Returns details of a specific offer

params.offerId: ID of the offer to query

getTotalLiquidityAvailable().details: Returns total available liquidity across all active offers

params._borrowAsset: Address of the borrow asset token
params._market: Address of the associated market contract

modifyOffer(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint.details: Modifies an existing offer (amount, APR, or duration)

params.newAmount: New total amount (including already filled portion)
params.offerId: ID of the offer to modify

params.duration: Duration of the offer in seconds

returns.offerId: Unique identifier for the created offer
